title: RoutingSnapshot
description: Shared contract between model-scan (producer) and claude-code-proxy (consumer). The only coupling surface between the two projects. Contains no credentials.

schema_version.description: Semantic version. The consumer accepts a matching major version and refuses a newer major.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of snapshot generation.

blocklist.description: Model identifiers excluded from every selection and cascade.

provider_quota.description: Optional per-provider quota state used by the rotation policy. Keyed by provider name. Carries no credentials.

slots.description: Keyed by role id, e.g. R1_primary.

remaining_fraction.description: Fraction of the provider's quota window still available, 0 to 1.

reset_at.description: When the quota window resets (ISO 8601 UTC).

unit.description: Quota unit, e.g. requests, tokens, credits, messages.

best_tier_available.description: Quality tier of the best model still reachable on this provider, e.g. S.

source.description: Where this quota figure came from.

best.description: Null when no candidate qualified for this role.

candidates.description: Ranked best-first; includes the best entry.

base_url.description: May be empty; the router fills from its provider registry.

price_blended.description: Per-million-token blended price; null means unknown (ineligible for budget policies).
